confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule: Route all queries to BASELINE; no certified SLM region.
confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: Route all queries to BASELINE; no certified SLM region.

confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule: Route all queries to BASELINE; no certified SLM region.
confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: Route all queries to BASELINE; no certified SLM region.

confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule: SLM if score <= 0.3896; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.3896 < score < 0.4096; BASELINE otherwise.
confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: SLM if score <= 0.3896; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.3896 < score < 0.4096; BASELINE otherwise.

confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule: SLM if score <= 0.7656; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.7656 < score < 0.9039; BASELINE otherwise.
confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: SLM if score <= 0.7656; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.7656 < score < 0.9039; BASELINE otherwise.
